news.t: International Small-Caps Offer Plenty of Perks
5 High-Yield ETFs to Buy for Long-Term Income

holdings.infoBox: DLS is an equity ETF with a total of 1021 individual holdings. The top holdings are Höegh Autoliners ASA stock at 0.82%, Hafnia at 0.72%, Elecnor at 0.71%, Plus500 at 0.64%, and NOS, S.G.P.S. at 0.53%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree International SmallCap Dividend Fund (DLS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund tracks a dividend-weighted index of small-cap companies located in developed countries outside of the US and Canada. DLS was launched on Jun 16, 2006 and is issued by WisdomTree.

data.title: International Small-Caps Offer Plenty of Perks
data.text: Market participants in the U.S., broadly speaking, already perceive international equities as being more volatile than domestic equivalents. They also believe that scenario is amplified with smaller s...

data.title: 5 High-Yield ETFs to Buy for Long-Term Income
data.text: The Federal Reserve recently suggested that the U.S. economy will shrink by 6.5% – its worst annual performance since World War II. The Fed also expects unemployment to finish the year over 9%.
